test_cases.description: Featured pop song in documentary opening sequence

input.content: 45 seconds of a well-known 1979 pop song, prominently featured
input.use: Opening sequence of a feature documentary
input.distribution: International theatrical, global streaming, possible broadcast

test_cases.notes: Sync vs master distinction made explicit and clear. Rights holder identification approach specific. Fee range flagged as realistic without being misleading. Music supervisor recommendation appropriate.

test_cases.description: Archive news footage clip from the 1990s

input.content: 20 seconds of news broadcast footage from 1994 showing a public political event
input.use: Documentary film — footage appears in a montage, not prominently featured
input.rights_holder: Believed to be held by a major international news agency

test_cases.notes: Archive footage licensing correctly differentiated from music licensing. Underlying rights in archive footage (music, third-party footage within news clip) flagged. Incidental use distinction noted.

input.content: A portrait photograph taken in 1962, photographer known but deceased
input.use: Full-page reproduction in a print magazine article
input.rights_holder: Believed to be photographer's estate, represented by a photo agency

test_cases.notes: Still image licensing correctly differentiated from audio-visual licensing. Estate representation through agency correctly identified. Print vs digital distinction in scope correctly noted. Copyright term calculation flagged as jurisdiction-dependent.
